parameters.html:
PESAS CHILE®
Alerta de caso WhatsApp

Se detectó un caso que requiere revisión humana. La respuesta al cliente debe realizarse desde el HUB.

Acción requerida:
Abrir el caso en el HUB, revisar el contexto y responder desde la consola interna.

Caso
ID caso {{ $json.email_context.case_id || 'Sin ID' }}
Departamento {{ $json.email_context.department || 'Sin departamento' }}
Servicio {{ $json.email_context.service_label || $json.email_context.service_code || 'Sin servicio' }}
Prioridad {{ $json.email_context.priority || 'normal' }}
Origen {{ ($json.email_context.source_table || 'sin_source_table') + ' / ' + ($json.email_context.source_id || 'sin_source_id') }}
Cliente
Nombre {{ $json.email_context.customer_name || 'Sin nombre' }}
WhatsApp {{ $json.email_context.wa_id || 'Sin teléfono' }}
Correo {{ $json.email_context.customer_email || 'Sin correo' }}
RUT {{ $json.email_context.customer_rut || 'Sin RUT' }}
Mensaje recibido
Mensaje {{ $json.email_context.message_text || 'Sin mensaje' }}
Motivo {{ $json.email_context.decision_reason || 'Revisión humana requerida' }}
Orden asociada al caso
ID orden {{ $json.email_context.id_order || 'Sin id_order' }}
Nota de venta {{ $json.email_context.invoice_number || 'Sin nota de venta' }}
Productos {{ '
    ' + String($json.email_context.product_names || 'Sin productos') .split('||') .join('|') .split('|') .map(p => '
  • ' + p.trim() + '
    • ') .join('') + '
' }}
Dirección {{ $json.email_context.address_full || 'Sin dirección' }}
Comuna / ciudad {{ $json.email_context.city || 'Sin comuna' }}
Abrir caso en HUB

Nota: este correo muestra la orden asociada al caso. Para revisar historial completo, conversación y otras órdenes recientes del cliente, abrir el HUB.

Este correo fue generado automáticamente por OPS_Handoff_Manager.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  active_case_key,
  customer_key,
  case_scope_key,
  case_thread_key,
  case_topic,
  lifecycle_status,
  opened_at,
  reopened_at,
  last_reopened_from_case_id,
  active_scope_key,
  wa_id,
  contact_name,
  phone_number_id,
  channel,
  platform,
  department,
  status,
  priority,
  service_code,
  case_origin_type,
  source_table,
  source_id,
  id_order,
  id_customer,
  invoice_number,
  first_message_id,
  last_message_id,
  first_intent,
  last_intent,
  final_action,
  requires_human,
  bot_replied,
  bot_replied_at,
  message_count,
  assigned_to,
  closed_by,
  closed_at,
  notification_sent,
  notification_sent_at,
  first_message_at,
  last_message_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  case_view_token,

  CASE
    WHEN
      id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 1

    WHEN
      source_table = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND source_id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 2

    WHEN
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 3

    WHEN
      id_customer = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 4

    WHEN
      active_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 5

    WHEN
      active_case_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 6

    WHEN
      case_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 7

    WHEN
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND COALESCE(opened_at, last_message_at, updated_at, created_at) >= DATE_SUB(
        CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '-04:00'),
        INTERVAL {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.window_hours || 120 }} HOUR
      )
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 8

    WHEN
      wa_id = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 9

    ELSE 99
  END AS existing_match_priority

FROM n8n_conversation_cases

WHERE
  closed_at IS NULL
  AND active_scope_key IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(
    NULLIF(lifecycle_status, ''),
    CASE
      WHEN status IN ('human_required', 'waiting_human') THEN 'waiting_human'
      WHEN status IN ('pending', 'waiting_customer') THEN 'waiting_customer'
      WHEN status IN ('open', 'new') THEN 'active'
      WHEN status IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'resuelto', 'cerrado', 'rechazado', 'rejected') THEN 'closed'
      WHEN status = 'archived' THEN 'archived'
      ELSE 'active'
    END
  ) IN ('active', 'waiting_customer', 'waiting_human')

  AND (
    (
      id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      source_table = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND source_id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      id_customer = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      active_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      active_case_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      case_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND COALESCE(opened_at, last_message_at, updated_at, created_at) >= DATE_SUB(
        CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '-04:00'),
        INTERVAL {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.window_hours || 120 }} HOUR
      )
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      wa_id = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )
  )

ORDER BY
  existing_match_priority ASC,

  CASE
    WHEN service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END ASC,

  CASE
    WHEN case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END ASC,

  updated_at DESC,
  id DESC

LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  active_case_key,
  customer_key,
  case_scope_key,
  case_thread_key,
  case_topic,
  lifecycle_status,
  opened_at,
  reopened_at,
  last_reopened_from_case_id,
  active_scope_key,
  wa_id,
  contact_name,
  phone_number_id,
  channel,
  platform,
  department,
  status,
  priority,
  service_code,
  case_origin_type,
  source_table,
  source_id,
  id_order,
  id_customer,
  invoice_number,
  first_message_id,
  last_message_id,
  first_intent,
  last_intent,
  final_action,
  requires_human,
  bot_replied,
  bot_replied_at,
  message_count,
  assigned_to,
  closed_by,
  closed_at,
  notification_sent,
  notification_sent_at,
  first_message_at,
  last_message_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  case_view_token
FROM n8n_conversation_cases
WHERE
  (
    id = {{ $json.existing_case_id || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ $json.existing_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    source_table = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND source_id = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.source_id || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.source_table && $json.handoff_case_identity?.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    customer_key = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND id_order = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.customer_key && $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    id_customer = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
    AND id_order = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.id_customer && $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    case_scope_key = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
ORDER BY
  updated_at DESC,
  id DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.html:
PESAS CHILE®
Alerta de caso WhatsApp

Acción requerida:
Revisar el caso en HUB y contactar al cliente con la información operacional completa.

Datos del cliente

Nombre {{ $json.email_context.customer.name || 'Sin nombre' }}
Teléfono WhatsApp {{ $json.email_context.customer.wa_id || 'Sin teléfono' }}
Correo {{ $json.email_context.customer.email || 'Sin correo' }}
RUT {{ $json.email_context.customer.rut || 'Sin RUT' }}
Dirección {{ $json.email_context.customer.address || 'Sin dirección' }}
Comuna {{ $json.email_context.customer.city || 'Sin comuna' }}

Respuesta del cliente

Intención detectada {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.detected_intent || 'Sin intención' }}
Acción {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.action || 'Sin acción' }}
Mensaje {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.message || 'Sin mensaje' }}
Fecha respuesta {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.replied_at || 'Sin fecha' }}
{{ $json.email_context.maintenance.exists ? `

Datos de mantención

ID orden ${$json.email_context.maintenance.id_order || $json.email_context.order.id_order || 'Sin id_order'}
Nota de venta ${$json.email_context.maintenance.invoice_number || $json.email_context.order.invoice_number || 'Sin nota de venta'}
Etapa ${$json.email_context.maintenance.stage || 'Sin etapa'}
Ciclo ${$json.email_context.maintenance.cycle || 'Sin ciclo'}
Fecha compra ${$json.email_context.maintenance.purchase_date || 'Sin fecha compra'}
Meses desde compra ${$json.email_context.maintenance.months_since_purchase || 'Sin meses'}
Fecha objetivo mantención ${$json.email_context.maintenance.maintenance_due_date || 'Sin fecha objetivo'}
` : '' }} {{ $json.email_context.assembly.exists ? `

Datos de armado

ID orden ${$json.email_context.assembly.id_order || $json.email_context.order.id_order || 'Sin id_order'}
Nota de venta ${$json.email_context.assembly.invoice_number || $json.email_context.order.invoice_number || 'Sin nota de venta'}
Estado armado ${$json.email_context.assembly.status || 'Sin estado'}
Dirección despacho ${$json.email_context.assembly.delivery_address || 'Sin dirección'}
Comuna despacho ${$json.email_context.assembly.delivery_city || 'Sin comuna'}
` : '' }}

Equipos asociados

Productos
    {{ $json.email_context.equipment.product_names.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join('') }}
Referencias
    {{ $json.email_context.equipment.product_references.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join('') }}
Abrir caso en HUB

Caso {{ $json.email_context.case_id || 'Sin ID' }} · {{ $json.email_context.service_label || 'Servicio no identificado' }} · {{ $json.email_context.department || 'Sin departamento' }}

SELECT
  id,
  active_case_key,
  customer_key,
  case_scope_key,
  case_thread_key,
  case_topic,
  lifecycle_status,
  opened_at,
  reopened_at,
  last_reopened_from_case_id,
  active_scope_key,
  wa_id,
  contact_name,
  phone_number_id,
  channel,
  platform,
  department,
  status,
  priority,
  service_code,
  case_origin_type,
  source_table,
  source_id,
  id_order,
  id_customer,
  invoice_number,
  first_message_id,
  last_message_id,
  first_intent,
  last_intent,
  final_action,
  requires_human,
  bot_replied,
  bot_replied_at,
  message_count,
  assigned_to,
  closed_by,
  closed_at,
  notification_sent,
  notification_sent_at,
  first_message_at,
  last_message_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  case_view_token,

  CASE
    WHEN
      id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 1

    WHEN
      source_table = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND source_id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 2

    WHEN
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 3

    WHEN
      id_customer = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 4

    WHEN
      active_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 5

    WHEN
      active_case_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 6

    WHEN
      case_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 7

    WHEN
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND COALESCE(opened_at, last_message_at, updated_at, created_at) >= DATE_SUB(
        CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '-04:00'),
        INTERVAL {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.window_hours || 120 }} HOUR
      )
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 8

    WHEN
      wa_id = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    THEN 9

    ELSE 99
  END AS existing_match_priority

FROM n8n_conversation_cases

WHERE
  closed_at IS NULL
  AND active_scope_key IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(
    NULLIF(lifecycle_status, ''),
    CASE
      WHEN status IN ('human_required', 'waiting_human') THEN 'waiting_human'
      WHEN status IN ('pending', 'waiting_customer') THEN 'waiting_customer'
      WHEN status IN ('open', 'new') THEN 'active'
      WHEN status IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'resuelto', 'cerrado', 'rechazado', 'rejected') THEN 'closed'
      WHEN status = 'archived' THEN 'archived'
      ELSE 'active'
    END
  ) IN ('active', 'waiting_customer', 'waiting_human')

  AND (
    (
      id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.explicit_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      source_table = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND source_id = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_table && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      id_customer = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_customer && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      active_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      active_case_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.active_case_key_legacy_candidate ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      case_scope_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      customer_key = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND COALESCE(opened_at, last_message_at, updated_at, created_at) >= DATE_SUB(
        CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), '+00:00', '-04:00'),
        INTERVAL {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.window_hours || 120 }} HOUR
      )
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.customer_key && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )

    OR
    (
      wa_id = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND id_order = {{ $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order || 'NULL' }}
      AND {{ ($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.wa_id && $('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
    )
  )

ORDER BY
  existing_match_priority ASC,

  CASE
    WHEN service_code = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.service_code || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END ASC,

  CASE
    WHEN case_topic = '{{ (($('Code - Build Case Identity').item.json.handoff_case_identity.case_topic || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END ASC,

  updated_at DESC,
  id DESC

LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  active_case_key,
  customer_key,
  case_scope_key,
  case_thread_key,
  case_topic,
  lifecycle_status,
  opened_at,
  reopened_at,
  last_reopened_from_case_id,
  active_scope_key,
  wa_id,
  contact_name,
  phone_number_id,
  channel,
  platform,
  department,
  status,
  priority,
  service_code,
  case_origin_type,
  source_table,
  source_id,
  id_order,
  id_customer,
  invoice_number,
  first_message_id,
  last_message_id,
  first_intent,
  last_intent,
  final_action,
  requires_human,
  bot_replied,
  bot_replied_at,
  message_count,
  assigned_to,
  closed_by,
  closed_at,
  notification_sent,
  notification_sent_at,
  first_message_at,
  last_message_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  case_view_token
FROM n8n_conversation_cases
WHERE
  (
    id = {{ $json.existing_case_id || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ $json.existing_case_id ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    source_table = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.source_table || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND source_id = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.source_id || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.source_table && $json.handoff_case_identity?.source_id) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    customer_key = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.customer_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND id_order = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.customer_key && $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    id_customer = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_customer || 'NULL' }}
    AND id_order = {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order || 'NULL' }}
    AND {{ ($json.handoff_case_identity?.id_customer && $json.handoff_case_identity?.id_order) ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
  OR
  (
    case_scope_key = '{{ (($json.handoff_case_identity?.case_scope_key || '')).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND {{ $json.handoff_case_identity?.case_scope_key ? '1' : '0' }} = 1
  )
ORDER BY
  updated_at DESC,
  id DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.html:
PESAS CHILE®
Alerta de caso WhatsApp

Acción requerida:
Revisar el caso en HUB y contactar al cliente con la información operacional completa.

Datos del cliente

Nombre {{ $json.email_context.customer.name || 'Sin nombre' }}
Teléfono WhatsApp {{ $json.email_context.customer.wa_id || 'Sin teléfono' }}
Correo {{ $json.email_context.customer.email || 'Sin correo' }}
RUT {{ $json.email_context.customer.rut || 'Sin RUT' }}
Dirección {{ $json.email_context.customer.address || 'Sin dirección' }}
Comuna {{ $json.email_context.customer.city || 'Sin comuna' }}

Respuesta del cliente

Intención detectada {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.detected_intent || 'Sin intención' }}
Acción {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.action || 'Sin acción' }}
Mensaje {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.message || 'Sin mensaje' }}
Fecha respuesta {{ $json.email_context.customer_reply.replied_at || 'Sin fecha' }}
{{ $json.email_context.maintenance.exists ? `

Datos de mantención

ID orden ${$json.email_context.maintenance.id_order || $json.email_context.order.id_order || 'Sin id_order'}
Nota de venta ${$json.email_context.maintenance.invoice_number || $json.email_context.order.invoice_number || 'Sin nota de venta'}
Etapa ${$json.email_context.maintenance.stage || 'Sin etapa'}
Ciclo ${$json.email_context.maintenance.cycle || 'Sin ciclo'}
Fecha compra ${$json.email_context.maintenance.purchase_date || 'Sin fecha compra'}
Meses desde compra ${$json.email_context.maintenance.months_since_purchase || 'Sin meses'}
Fecha objetivo mantención ${$json.email_context.maintenance.maintenance_due_date || 'Sin fecha objetivo'}
` : '' }} {{ $json.email_context.assembly.exists ? `

Datos de armado

ID orden ${$json.email_context.assembly.id_order || $json.email_context.order.id_order || 'Sin id_order'}
Nota de venta ${$json.email_context.assembly.invoice_number || $json.email_context.order.invoice_number || 'Sin nota de venta'}
Estado armado ${$json.email_context.assembly.status || 'Sin estado'}
Dirección despacho ${$json.email_context.assembly.delivery_address || 'Sin dirección'}
Comuna despacho ${$json.email_context.assembly.delivery_city || 'Sin comuna'}
` : '' }}

Equipos asociados

Productos
    {{ $json.email_context.equipment.product_names.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join('') }}
Referencias
    {{ $json.email_context.equipment.product_references.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join('') }}
Abrir caso en HUB

Caso {{ $json.email_context.case_id || 'Sin ID' }} · {{ $json.email_context.service_label || 'Servicio no identificado' }} · {{ $json.email_context.department || 'Sin departamento' }}
